title: Serving Tray with Golden Handles, Acrylic Decorative Candle Trays Round Perfume Plate Reusable Plastic Serving Platters, Serving Tray for Home Restaurant Bar Breakfast Coffee Tea Fruit
features: 【This Serving Tray with Golden Handles】Our serving tray features two golden handles on both sides for easy transporting from room to room. Serving trays for Parties Size: 27x27cm (10.6in).

【Acrylic Decorative Tray】Our Round Coffee Table Tray is made of high-quality, durable acrylic plastic which is easy to clean, with a thickened design that is both durable and has a crystal-like luster. The edges are smooth and won't hurt your hands. Compared with wooden trays, our trays do not absorb water and are easier to clean.

【Multi-Purpose Display Tray】Our decorative tray is versatile and can be used as a dinner plate, fruit display plate, or even as a sandwich and party snack platter. It's also an excellent storage option for small items, making it perfect for use in the kitchen, living room, bathroom, countertops, desks, and dressers.

【Stylish Luxury Design】Our decorative tray features classic stripes and an smooth surface that reflects its distinctive beauty. It's full of art and an ideal housewarming gift or birthday present for friends and family members who love stylish design.

【Perfect Serving Platter for Food】The acrylic decorative tray is perfect for serving food, including appetizers, main courses, and desserts at both home and restaurants. It's also great for carrying multiple drinks like water, tea, or coffee to family, friends, or house guests.
description: Features: -Along with serving food and drink, these decorative trays can be used as storage for small items to help save space and stay organised. - Ideal as beverage trays, dinner plates, decorative fruit display plates, or as sandwich and party snack plates. -The breakfast tray is made of high quality plastic, sturdy and durable, with strong drop resistance. -The surface of the plate is finely polished, smooth and will not hurt your hands. -They are suitable for use in a kitchen, living room, bathroom, countertops, desks, dressers. Specifications: Material: Acrylic Plastic Colour: Golden Diameter : 27cm Thickness: 2mm Package includes: 1x Plastic Tray Notes: We value customer satisfaction, if the item you received is damaged due to the inevitable extrusion and collision during transportation, please contact us in time, we will solve your problem within 24 hours.
